title: Fornells Night Market
location: Es Pla de Fornells, Fornells (Es Mercadal)
description: The fishing village of Fornells sets up a summer night market on Es Pla, on weekend evenings (roughly 18:00 to midnight), with crafts, costume jewellery and local produce facing the bay. It runs from mid-June to mid-September. Exact 2026 dates to be confirmed.
